Title: Abstract Heartbeat EKG Waveform Science Minimalist Design Tee
Description:
Celebrate science and life with this abstract representation of a heartbeat (EKG/ECG) waveform. This unique design uses vibrant, neon pink lines against a colorful, gradient background to evoke the feeling of life, rhythm, and connectivity.

  • Vibrant Artistry: The wave is set against a striking, colorful gradient—a mix of magenta, yellow, and orange—making it visually captivating and eye-catching.
  • Symbolic Meaning: The heartbeat symbol is universally recognized, making this design meaningful for health enthusiasts, science lovers, or anyone who appreciates the rhythm of life.
  • Comfortable Wear: Printed on a soft, breathable orange t-shirt, this design ensures both style and comfort for everyday wear.
  • Perfect Gift: Makes a thoughtful and artistic gift for Valentine's Day, fitness buffs, students, or anyone who appreciates modern, graphic art.

Whether you wear it out or keep it casual, this tee is a conversation starter and a celebration of the extraordinary rhythm within.
